description: Modello e-learning usato negli articoli montelli.dev su OpenFGA. Capability granulari su system:main + gerarchia course -> lesson.
dsl:
model
  schema 1.1

type user

type group
  relations
    define member: [user]

type system
  relations
    define root:             [user, group#member]
    define blocked:          [user, group#member]
    define creator:          [user, group#member]
    define user_manager:     [user, group#member]
    define settings_manager: [user, group#member]

    define can_insert:          (creator or root) but not blocked
    define can_manage_users:    (user_manager or root) but not blocked
    define can_manage_settings: (settings_manager or root) but not blocked

type course
  relations
    define editor: [user, group#member]
    define viewer: [user, group#member]
    define can_edit: editor
    define can_view: viewer or editor

type lesson
  relations
    define parent: [course]
    define editor: [user, group#member]
    define can_edit: editor or editor from parent
    define can_view: editor or viewer from parent or editor from parent
